name: Miter
description: The Miter launches high velocity saw blades, tearing apart anyone unfortunate enough to be in their path.

components.name: Blueprint
components.description: The Miter launches high velocity saw blades, tearing apart anyone unfortunate enough to be in their path.

patchlogs.name: Operation: Scarlet Spear: 27.3.0
patchlogs.additions: Added custom reload sounds for the Miter!

patchlogs.name: Warframe Revised: Update 27.2.0
patchlogs.changes: Updated the reload animation for the Miter to better suit its uniqueness.

patchlogs.name: Update 26: The Old Blood
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Mirage Eclipse’s damage buff not increasing the damage of Miter shots and by extension not increasing the damage of Slash procs caused by it.

patchlogs.name: Fortuna: The Profit-Taker - Update 24.2
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Miter Augment Neutralizing Justice not working on Nullifier Bubbles in Orb Vallis.

patchlogs.name: Plains of Eidolon: Update 22.3.0
patchlogs.changes: Miter blades will now bounce off the Blunt.

patchlogs.name: Octavia's Anthem: Update 20.1.0
patchlogs.changes: Reduced AOE range of Miter with the Thundermiter Mod from 2.5 to 2m in Conclave.

patchlogs.name: Octavia's Anthem: Hotfix 20.0.6
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Arsenal displaying incorrect stats for the Crit Chance of the Miter's charged projectiles.

patchlogs.name: Octavia's Anthem: Hotfix 20.0.5
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Miter charged projectiles not having their proper Punch-Through.

patchlogs.name: Octavia's Anthem: Update 20
patchlogs.changes:
The Miter is one of the oldest examples of killer concept with lackluster results. The next Update will bring the following:
Like the Miter, the Panthera is a killer idea with lackluster execution. We've made the following changes:

patchlogs.name: Update: Specters of the Rail
patchlogs.changes: Conclave mod ‘Lucky Shot’ can no longer be used with the Miter.

patchlogs.name: Update 18.7.0
patchlogs.changes: •    The Deft Tempo Mod can no longer be used with the Opticor or Miter.

patchlogs.name: Update 18.5: Sands of Inaros
patchlogs.fixes:
Thundermiter (Miter) 
Removed bounce from Miter’s charged shot in Conclave.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 18.1.3
patchlogs.changes: Decreased ammo pool of Miter in Conclave.

patchlogs.name: Update 18: The Second Dream
patchlogs.changes: The Supra and Miter’s projectile speed has been increased in PvP.

patchlogs.name: Update 17: Echoes Of The Sentient
patchlogs.changes: The Burston, Opticor, Miter, Hind, Grinlok, Marelok, Twin Gremlins, Tiberon, Tetra, Buzlok, Attica, Vasto, Seer and Supra are now available for use in Conclave.  This list includes all weapon variants.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 15.10.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed various audio FX inconsistencies that would occur when firing the Panthera or Miter.

patchlogs.name: Update 15.7.2 + 15.7.2.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Miter’s charge loop sound continuously playing after charge has been completed.

patchlogs.name: Update 13.5.0: Edo Armor & Nami Solo
patchlogs.changes: Miter base damage has been increased along with the flight speed and proc chance of charged shots

patchlogs.name: 13.4.0: Serro + Psa!
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed an issue with Miter's projectile FX orientation.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 10.3.2
patchlogs.fixes: Fix for Miter blades firing on wrong axis.

patchlogs.name: Update 10.1.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fix for Miter not taking energy color attributes.Fix for pickups not working in Conclave.

patchlogs.name: Update 9.7
patchlogs.changes: Miter – increased fire rate, higher charge damage. Charged shots fire through targets.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 9.5.3
patchlogs.fixes: Fix for the Miter’s holster position.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 9.5.2
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed custom colours not applying to Miter saw blades or boomerang.

patchlogs.name: Update 9.5: Operation Arid Fear
patchlogs.additions: New weapon: Miter, a sawblade gun of death! Blueprint available on the hidden Grineer Settlements…
